◎主　　演　尼基·劳达 Niki Lauda
　　　　　  詹姆斯·亨特 James Hunt
　　　　　  杰基·斯图尔特 Jackie Stewart
　　　　　  恩佐·法拉利 Enzo Ferrari


◎简　　介  

　　James Hunt has never been equalled. Could swashbuckling Hunt catch the scientific Lauda? Could Niki overcome an appalling crash to come back from the dead and fight James all the way to the last race of the season?This powerful story captures the heart of the 1970s - told through unseen footage and exclusive interviews with the people who were really there - the team managers,...
